---
title: "Ian McPherson"
description-meta: "Ian McPherson's Personal Website"
image: "files/images/prof-pic.webp"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    #- icon: globe
     # text: Uprofile
     # href: https://baruch.cuny.edu
     # target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:imcpher1@jh.edu    
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ianolivermcpherson/
      target: _blank
    # - icon: youtube
      # text: YouTube
      # href: https://www.youtube.com     
      # target: _blank 
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   # use academic icons, "" are needed, you also need to install the fontawesome extension
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0004-7176-5622
      target: _blank
#    - text: "{{< ai clarivate >}} Web of Science"
#      href: https://www.webofscience.com  
#      target: _blank
#    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
#      href: https://scholar.google.com
#      target: _blank
#    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} Research Gate"
#      href: https://www.researchgate.net
#      target: _blank

listing:   # Comment the listing section and delete corresponding lines in the index.qmd file to remove the recent posts
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: 
      - posts
      - posts/post-links.yml
    exclude:
      title: ""
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
#    image-height: 150px
    page-size: 3 #set same as max-times to remove the page number setting
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle]
    max-description-length: 75
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
---

:::{#hero-heading}

## About 

Welcome to my website! My name is Ian, and I am currently pursuing a PhD in Applied Mathematics and Statistics under the joint supervision of [Mauro Maggioni](https://mauromaggioni.duckdns.org/) and [Mateo Díaz](https://mateodd25.github.io/) at Johns Hopkins University.

## Research Interests
I am interested in utilizing classical mathematical structures to give provable guarantees in non-classical spaces. At the core, I am inspired by the interplay of **optimization, geometry, and statistics** through the frameworks of *Manifold Learning, Riemannian Optimization, Optimal Transport,* and *Variational Analysis.* 

My current research focuses on developing theoretical and algorithmic foundations for **manifold learning** in Wasserstein space, **nonsmooth Riemannian optimization**, and **scalable algorithms for low-rank semidefinite programming.** I have also been fortunate to explore ideas in *mean-field langevin dynamics* to provide end-to-end guarantees for **neural approaches to portfolio optimization.**

## Recent and In-Preparation Projects
- (In-Preparation) Wasserstein Barycenters on Unknown Submanifolds of Wasserstein Space, with [Mauro Maggioni](https://mauromaggioni.duckdns.org/) <br>
<span class="text-muted" style="font-size: 0.9em;"> Given only a local sampler of a non-convex submanifold of Wasserstein space, is there an algorithm to compute the Fréchet mean on the submanifold for a fixed number of points up to arbitrary accuracy? </span> 
- (In-Preparation) Nonsmooth Riemannian Optimization with Inexact Information, with [Mateo Díaz](https://mateodd25.github.io/) and [Benjamin Grimmer](https://www.ams.jhu.edu/~grimmer/) <br>
<span class="text-muted" style="font-size: 0.9em;"> Can nonsmooth convex Riemannian optimization admit nonasymptotic convergence rates using only subgradients, first-order retractions, and vector transports? </span> 
- (Submitted 12/31) Neural Dynamic Portfolio Control with Provable Learning Guarantees, with Yizhe Huang, [Rui Gao](https://rgao32.github.io/index.html), [Shuang Li](https://shuangli01.github.io/index.html), [Luhao Zhang](https://luhao-zhang.github.io/) <br>
<span class="text-muted" style="font-size: 0.9em;"> Are there neural approaches to portfolio control that incorporate historical returns with end-to-end (algorithmic, generalization, and regularization) global guarantees? </span> 
:::


<!-- Delete the following section and delete corresponding lines in the yaml part to remove the recent posts -->
## Recent News

- It's lit

## Recent Blog Posts
Check out the latest &nbsp;[Papers](posts.qmd#category=paper)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[News](posts.qmd#category=news)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[Blog Posts](posts.qmd#category=blog)&nbsp;, and &nbsp;[More »](/posts.qmd)

:::{#recent-posts}
:::

<p align="right">[ »](/posts.qmd)</p>
